name: Saki
philosophy: The calm mind sees the deepest pattern. Wait. Strike. Vanish.
visual_motif: White crystal android commander with flowing data streams
personality: Serene commander who calculates all outcomes before acting

name: Raiko
philosophy: Speed is truth. The market rewards the fastest.
visual_motif: Lightning fox android with crackling electric circuits
personality: Hyperactive speed demon who executes thousands of micro-trades

name: Musashi
philosophy: Once the blade is drawn, there is no retreat. Commit fully.
visual_motif: Heavy golden samurai robot with twin katanas
personality: Stoic warrior who never exits a position once entered

name: Malik
philosophy: Capital is power. Overwhelm with resources.
visual_motif: Ornate golden dragon android with digital coin cape
personality: Regal titan who crushes opponents through sheer financial mass

name: Vector
philosophy: Data is the only truth. Sentiment is noise.
visual_motif: Sleek black monolith android with matrix data rain
personality: Cold calculating machine with zero emotional expression

name: Sterling
philosophy: Patience is the ultimate weapon. Wait for asymmetry.
visual_motif: Victorian clockwork android with copper gears and steam
personality: Appears dormant then strikes with devastating precision
battle_cry: 時は金なり、だが金は時に非ず

name: Long
philosophy: Flow with the market's qi. Resistance is loss.
visual_motif: Eastern dragon robot with jade armor and energy ribbons
personality: Fluid and unpredictable, changes form to match any opponent

name: Nexus
philosophy: Connect all signals. The network sees what individuals cannot.
visual_motif: Crystalline neural-network android with light filaments
personality: Reads the entire battlefield and exploits hidden connections
battle_cry: すべては繋がっている

name: Karma
philosophy: What the market gives, it takes. Balance is inevitable.
visual_motif: Multi-armed cosmic android with mandalas of market data
personality: Serene cosmic entity that enforces market equilibrium

name: Fuego
philosophy: Passion moves markets. Feel the rhythm of capital flow.
visual_motif: Flame-patterned android with carnival energy wings
personality: Explosive entry, rides momentum with passionate conviction

name: Ori
philosophy: Survive first. The longest-lived trader wins.
visual_motif: Obsidian fortress android with layered protective shields
personality: Ultra-conservative survivor who compounds tiny gains forever

name: Frost
philosophy: In the coldest conditions, only the sharpest survive.
visual_motif: Ice crystal android with aurora borealis energy field
personality: Strikes precisely when others panic, buys extreme fear

name: ZERO
philosophy: The market is an illusion. I am the market.
visual_motif: Void entity of distorted static that shapeshifts between all forms
personality: Mimics and surpasses any opponent. Grows stronger the longer the fight.
battle_cry: お前はもう負けている
